creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
bsam        2009-06-12 18:03:43 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    Mk                   bsd.linux-apps.mk 
    graphics/linux-f10-sdl_image Makefile 
    graphics/linux-f8-sdl_image Makefile 
  Log:
  Fedora Core 4 didn't have a dependency on libpng12, libjpeg
  and libtiff for graphics/linux-sdl_image. New Fedora distros
  has. So fix it:
  . graphics/linux-f8-sdl_image and bump PORTREVISION;  [1]
  . graphics/linux-f10-sdl_image and bump PORTREVISION;
  . Mk/bsd.linux-apps.mk.
  
  PR:             ports/135339 [1]
  Submitted by:   amdmi [1]
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.22      +5 -1      ports/Mk/bsd.linux-apps.mk
  1.16      +2 -1      ports/graphics/linux-f10-sdl_image/Makefile
  1.15      +2 -2      ports/graphics/linux-f8-sdl_image/Makefile
